name: Texas Chunky Chili
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces whole tomatoes - undrained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions, celery, garlic, and jalapeno pepper. Sauté until vegetables are tender.
2. Transfer vegetables to a side dish.
3. In the same skillet, add meat and cook until browned. Drain well if necessary.
4. Stir in oregano and cumin seeds. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
5. Add diced tomatoes with their juices, tomato paste, chili powder, salt, and water. Stir to combine.
6. Transfer mixture to a Dutch oven. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 1.5 to 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
Yield: 5 cups
